action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Novak, Armstrong, Billings, Clancy, Krug, Madison, Mayadev, Moore Omokunde, Mursau, Neubauer, O'Connor, Phelps, Steffen, Stroud, Stubbs, Knodl and Dittrich; 
cosponsored by Senators James, Dassler-Alfheim, Habush Sinykin, Keyeski, Pfaff, Spreitzer and Wall
